title: Not very musical
question: 把今天课文里的“新地方 -> 第一眼惊讶 -> 仔细观察 -> 清楚解释”放进一个市场或街头表演场景。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: As we had walked through the market for a long time, we stopped at a square to have a rest. After a time, we noticed a street performer. When the music began, we had our first glimpse of the performance. Later, I realized it followed the performer's movements. At first, I could not tell the difference between the music and the movement.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 用 As 交代背景：我们已经在市场里走了很久，所以停在广场休息
options.english_template: As we had walked through the market for a long time, ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用 After a time 推进时间：过了一会儿，我们注意到一个街头表演者

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 用 glimpse 描述第一眼：音乐响起时，我们第一次看到表演
options.english_template: When the music began, we had ___ of the performance.

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 用 Later, I realized 说清楚后来理解的原因：它跟着表演者的动作

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 用 tell the difference 表达：一开始我分不清音乐和动作的区别
options.english_template: At first, I could not ___ between the music and the movement.
